infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tyre Rescue uses the camera so operators can send job photos in Assisted Chat.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Tyre Rescue uses the microphone so operators can send voice messages in Assisted Chat.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tyre Rescue uses your photo library so operators can send images in Assisted Chat.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tyre Rescue Assisted Chat lets operators view customer and driver locations for active rescue bookings.
